ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the aircraft */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of last modification to the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft the sensor is installed on */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight session */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft used in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of flight session (e.g., training, testing, simulation) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the flight session */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the flight session */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot flying the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_sessions_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_sessions_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the data was collected in */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data point (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control input */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the input was applied in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the control input */,
  "roll_body" REAL /* Roll input */,
  "pitch_body" REAL /* Pitch input */,
  "yaw_body" REAL /* Yaw input */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Throttle input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_inputs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion parameter */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the parameter was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the motion parameter */,
  "q_d[0]" REAL /* Quarternion value 0 */,
  "q_d[1]" REAL /* Quarternion value 1 */,
  "q_d[2]" REAL /* Quarternion value 2 */,
  "q_d[3]" REAL /* Quarternion value 3 */,
  "angular_velocity[0]" REAL /* Angular velocity value 0 */,
  "angular_velocity[1]" REAL /* Angular velocity value 1 */,
  "angular_velocity[2]" REAL /* Angular velocity value 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_parameters_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thrust_vectors" (
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thrust vector */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the vector was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the thrust vector */,
  "thrust_body[0]" REAL /* Thrust value 0 in body frame */,
  "thrust_body[1]" REAL /* Thrust value 1 in body frame */,
  "thrust_body[2]" REAL /* Thrust value 2 in body frame */,
  "thrust_earth[0]" REAL /* Thrust value 0 in earth frame */,
  "thrust_earth[1]" REAL /* Thrust value 1 in earth frame */,
  "thrust_earth[2]" REAL /* Thrust value 2 in earth frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thrust_vectors_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yaw_sp_move_rate" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yaw sp move rate */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the rate was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the yaw sp move rate */,
  "yaw_sp_move_rate" REAL /* Yaw sp move rate value */,
  "yaw_sp_move_rate_cmd" REAL /* Yaw sp move rate command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yaw_sp_move_rate_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "q_d_valid" (
  "valid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each q_d valid */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the valid flag was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the q_d valid flag */,
  "q_d_valid" INTEGER /* Q_d valid flag value */,
  "q_d_valid_flag" INTEGER /* Q_d valid flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_q_d_valid_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roll_reset_integral" (
  "integral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roll reset integral */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the integral was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the roll reset integral */,
  "roll_reset_integral" REAL /* Roll reset integral value */,
  "roll_reset_integral_cmd" REAL /* Roll reset integral command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roll_reset_integral_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitch_reset_integral" (
  "integral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitch reset integral */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the integral was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the pitch reset integral */,
  "pitch_reset_integral" REAL /* Pitch reset integral value */,
  "pitch_reset_integral_cmd" REAL /* Pitch reset integral command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitch_reset_integral_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yaw_reset_integral" (
  "integral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yaw reset integral */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the integral was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the yaw reset integral */,
  "yaw_reset_integral" REAL /* Yaw reset integral value */,
  "yaw_reset_integral_cmd" REAL /* Yaw reset integral command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yaw_reset_integral_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fw_control_yaw" (
  "yaw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fw control yaw */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the yaw was measured in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the fw control yaw */,
  "fw_control_yaw" REAL /* Fw control yaw value */,
  "fw_control_yaw_cmd" REAL /* Fw control yaw command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yaw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fw_control_yaw_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "apply_flaps" (
  "flap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apply flaps */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight session the flaps were applied in */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the apply flaps */,
  "apply_flaps" INTEGER /* Apply flaps flag value */,
  "apply_flaps_cmd" INTEGER /* Apply flaps command */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apply_flaps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pilot */,
  "pilot_license_number" TEXT /* Pilot license number */,
  "pilot_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours flown by the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight session */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES flight_sessions ("session_id")
)
